title: magnolia × pilocarpa var. ellipticifolia
intro: Magnolia × pilocarpa var. ellipticifolia, a hybrid species of the magnolia plant, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Southeast Asia, known for its unique elliptic-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to alleviate various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Magnolia × pilocarpa var. ellipticifolia make it beneficial for reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
